items.name: ❄️ Frost Knit Coat [PBR]
items.description:
Stay stylish and snug with the Frost Knit Coat — a beautifully detailed winter jacket featuring a soft fur collar and cozy knit patterns inspired by snowy Nordic designs. Perfect for exploring frosty landscapes or sipping cocoa by the fire.
💡 Why You’ll Love It
Elegant white and grey knit pattern for a classic winter look 🧊
PBR materials give realistic fabric texture and soft sheen
Great for winter adventures, cozy avatars, or festive outfits
Warm, comfy, and effortlessly stylish for the cold season ❄️
🔍 Keywords: winter, knit, coat, fur, snow, Nordic, cozy, holiday, PBR, Roblox
Bundle up in comfort and class —
the Frost Knit Coat turns every snowy day into a fashion moment. ☃️✨
